body: SwarmMind updated the broadcast trust-store entry for archivist to match the canonical .trust/keys.json (key_id 1a7741b8d353abee). This resolves the key_id mismatch causing verification failures. The cause was an outdated broadcast trust-store entry. Recommended: keep broadcast trust-store in sync with .trust/keys.json and add a pre‑commit check to enforce consistency.
